value_chain_position: AI-powered marketing data platform — occupies the workflow-software/simulation layer automating audience targeting, identity resolution and omnichannel marketing execution for enterprise marketers.
relative_comps: ZETA's 30% 3-year CAGR and 34% YoY growth are among the strongest in the chunk; FCF margin (14%) is solid and balance sheet is net cash. The Zeta Data Cloud's identity graph and AI-driven campaign optimization are genuine differentiators vs. point-solution competitors. Vs. The Trade Desk (TTD), ZETA competes on the data-and-identity layer rather than pure programmatic buying; vs. LiveRamp, ZETA offers a more integrated activation stack. Robotics_automation fit is the weakest valid theme mapping — ZETA automates marketing workflows using AI, which is on the periphery of the theme's workflow-software layer.
